T1.criterion: import of main + execution_guard succeeds in isolated venv with no QC runtime present
T1.name: module_imports_clean

T10.criterion: contract count = floor((0.01 * portfolio_equity) / (N_entry * dollar_per_point)); deterministic on synthetic
T10.name: sizing_1pct_floor

T11.criterion: entry skipped + logged when computed contract count < 1; no fill
T11.name: skip_when_contract_count_lt_one

T12.criterion: non-RTH bars do NOT contribute to daily-bar derivation per market; bar-count attested
T12.name: rth_only_filter_attested

T13.criterion: roll dates absorb exactly 1 spread tick of cost per market; modeled_cost_dollar present in roll_attestation.json
T13.name: roll_cost_modeled_1_spread_tick

T14.criterion: matrix constructable with 5 cost tiers; per-market baseline reads from CONFIG byte-equivalent to Tier-N spec
T14.name: cost_stress_matrix_S0_S1_S2_S3_S4

T15.criterion: the 16+ item validator returns VALIDATOR_PASS on the synthetic smoke run; produces a sealed t1_t15 smoke pass JSON via LESSON_HUNTER_004 canonical roundtrip
T15.name: validator_harness_pass_on_synthetic

T2.criterion: runner class constructs on synthetic config without QC API access
T2.name: runner_class_instantiable

T3.criterion: WilderATR(20) on a deterministic synthetic series matches a hand-computed expected value within 1e-9
T3.name: wilder_atr_20_synthetic

T4.criterion: Donchian high/low channel computation on synthetic series matches expected for entry=55 and exit=20
T4.name: donchian_55_20_synthetic

T5.criterion: synthetic breakout bar fires the long-entry ENTRY_PENDING state for the next RTH open
T5.name: entry_trigger_synthetic_breakout

T6.criterion: initial stop set at exactly 2*N below entry for long (above for short); per-unit N recorded
T6.name: stop_placement_at_2n

T7.criterion: next pyramid trigger set at +0.5*N above (long) / below (short) last unit entry
T7.name: pyramid_trigger_at_05n

T8.criterion: all open units of a market exit at next RTH open when the Donchian-20 reverse channel is breached
T8.name: exit_on_donchian_20_reversal

T9.criterion: PortfolioCapTracker uses pyr.current_unit_count (max 4 per market * 4 markets = 16 cap); cap_binding_events_count == 0 in normal 4-unit lifecycle (s6 bugfix regression test)
T9.name: portfolio_cap_uses_unit_count
